plugins.name: ac-code-skill
plugins.description: Orchestrate a fleet of seven role-shaped subagents (Frontend, Backend, Cyber Security, Tester, DevOps, Docs, and an AI Agent Engineer for AI/LLM repos) over a codebase, coordinated through one shared memory plus living docs. Agents read the full state each run, check for outdated/dead dependencies and dead code, and self-improve. Docs auto-generate after review and update after fixes; fixes are approval-gated; deploys auto-run with rollback. 'run ac-code-skill' runs the whole pipeline in one prompt, and an empty repo triggers a from-scratch interview.
